# Product Directory Submissions — Pre-filled, ready for Carlos to submit

These are web-form only (no APIs). All content is pre-written. Estimated time: 10 minutes total for all three.

---

## 1. BetaList — betalist.com/submit

**What it does:** Features your startup for 24h on homepage + daily newsletter. Typically 387-1,000 visitors, 46-300 beta testers. Free. DR75 dofollow backlink.

**Form fields:**
- **Product name:** VerdeDesk
- **Tagline:** English-friendly recibos verdes for expats in Portugal
- **Description:** VerdeDesk is an English-first interface for Portugal's freelancer tax workflow. Issue recibos verdes, track income vs the €15,000 VAT threshold, and get compliance reminders — without reading a single line of Portuguese. Built for D8 visa holders and digital nomads.
- **Website:** https://verdedesk.vercel.app
- **Launch status:** Coming soon (waitlist)
- **Category:** Productivity / Finance
- **Twitter:** @chgmiranda

**After submitting:** BetaList typically takes 1-4 weeks to review free submissions. Paid expedited review ($129) gets you in within 48h — not recommended at this stage.

---

## 2. MicroLaunch — microlaunch.net

**What it does:** 50,000 monthly visitors, products run for one full month with community feedback. Free. DR59 dofollow backlink.

**Form fields:**
- **Product name:** VerdeDesk
- **Tagline:** The English UI for Portugal's freelancer tax portal
- **Short description:** Stop guessing at Portuguese tax forms. VerdeDesk guides English-speaking expats through the recibo verde workflow — income tracking, VAT threshold warnings, and compliance reminders. Built for D8 visa holders.
- **Full description:** Portugal's Portal das Finanças is mandatory for every freelancer — and it has no English version. One wrong dropdown can create a 23% VAT liability on income you already spent. VerdeDesk provides a plain-English interface for the entire workflow: activity code selection, receipt issuance, VAT threshold monitoring (with warnings before you cross €15,000), and quarterly Segurança Social reminders. Target user: English-speaking freelancer on a D8 digital nomad visa in Portugal.
- **Website:** https://verdedesk.vercel.app
- **Pricing:** Waitlist (launching at €9/month)
- **Category:** Finance / Productivity

---

## 3. Uneed — uneed.best/submit-a-tool

**What it does:** 15,000+ monthly visitors, 10-15 tools launched daily on homepage. Free listing.

**Form fields:**
- **Name:** VerdeDesk
- **Tagline:** English-friendly recibos verdes for Portugal's expat freelancers
- **Description:** Navigate Portugal's mandatory freelancer tax portal — entirely in English. VerdeDesk handles recibo verde issuance, tracks your running income vs the €15k VAT threshold (with a warning before you cross it), and sends quarterly Segurança Social deadline reminders. Built specifically for D8 visa holders and digital nomads who shouldn't need to pay €80/month just to issue invoices.
- **Website:** https://verdedesk.vercel.app
- **Category:** Finance

## After submitting
Reply to the agent: "Directories submitted: [list which ones]"
Agent will add entries to validation-status.json → posts array and update distribution log.
